variables.name: v4l2.V4L2_CAP_VBI_CAPTURE
documentation: Is a raw VBI capture device

documentation: Is a raw VBI output device

variables.name: v4l2.V4L2_CAP_SLICED_VBI_CAPTURE
documentation: Is a sliced VBI capture device

documentation: Is a sliced VBI output device

documentation: Is a video capture device that supports multiplanar formats

documentation: Is a video output device that supports multiplanar formats

variables.name: v4l2.V4L2_CAP_VIDEO_M2M_MPLANE
documentation: Is a video mem-to-mem device that supports multiplanar formats
